analysis.title: Guided Project Overview | Coursera
analysis.bodyText: 0/3 learning items A Build a computer vision app with Azure Cognitive Services Project 1 Project Overview Guided Project Overview Reading . Duration: 10 minutes 10 min Build a computer vision app with Azure Cognitive Services Lab . Duration: 41 minutes 41 min Assess Your Knowledge Graded Assignment . Duration: 30 minutes 30 min Course End Survey - We appreciate your feedback! Ungraded Plugin . Duration: 15 minutes 15 min Guided Project Overview 0:02 / 1:50 1x Welcome to Your Guided Project! This Guided Project runs on Coursera's hands-on interactive platform. This is a Intermediate project-based course which should take approximately 1.5 hours to finish. Familiarity with any Web Browser is assumed. Background knowledge on app/software development and cloud computing is required to complete this project. The series of tasks will mainly be carried out using a web browser. Meet Your Instructor Hi my name is Catalin and I will be taking you through this Guided Project. I have worked as an independent ICT consultant within the tech industry for many years, I am recognized as a Microsoft Azure Most Valuable Professional, as a Microsoft Certified Trainer and I also have developed several SaaS solutions based on AI technologies that are used by enterprises worldwide - so I hope to pass on my experience to you during this project Course Structure This course is divided into 4 parts: Guided Project Overview: This introductory reading material. Hands-on Project: This is the hands on project that we will work on. Graded Quiz: This is the final assignment that you need to pass in order to finish the course successfully. Learner Survey: Tell us what you thought about this guided project! Course Objectives In this course, we are going to focus on 3 learning objectives. 1. Creating a Computer Vision Cognitive Services resource using the Azure Portal 2. Using the resource via the API console and understanding how predictions are made 3. Understand the different API variations and features that Computer Vision offers. Earn Your Certificate After you have completed the hands-on project, you will be able to assess your knowledge using a graded assignment on Coursera. Score higher than 80% to earn your certificate ! Mark as completed Like Dislike Report an issue Go to next item
